specialistChecks.scope: parent plus eight stages after final Form integration

endToEndScenarios.name: SNC-TEST-0001 closure
endToEndScenarios.evidence: parent 845; stage tasks 846/847/848 plus Investigate 844; outcomes EVIDENCE_COMPLETE, APPROVED, RESOLUTION_COMPLETED, CLOSED; CaseId 1 authoritatively Closed

errata.description: Failed diagnostic workflow instances 820-828, 839, 841 and 843 remain in K2 runtime history from generator iteration.
errata.impact: They appear in management history but do not affect the verified definitions or closed validation case.
errata.remediation: Apply the environment's approved workflow-log retention procedure if removal is desired.

errata.description: Development assignments use $originator and seeded demonstration supplier/repository/identity values.
errata.impact: Production routing, calendars, repository integration, notifications, authority policy, and dynamic defaults remain solution/environment-specific configuration.
errata.remediation: Replace demonstration configuration during production hardening without changing the reusable case/UX templates.

errata.description: K2 5.10 emits a non-blocking DataLabel setValue null-index browser diagnostic on generated capture Views.
errata.impact: All 24 authenticated captures render content and pass layout checks; the diagnostic remains visible in every evidence report and any other diagnostic fails the gate.
errata.remediation: Re-test after a K2 platform update and remove the exact-signature allowlist when the platform no longer emits it.

errata.description: At 390px, the selected external PSF header clips long Form titles and K2's compact List control forces/truncates key columns even though the document itself does not overflow.
errata.impact: The hamburger shell and primary tasks remain usable, but narrow-screen information density is below the desktop experience.
errata.remediation: Improve the shared PSF header's narrow-width CSS and use a platform-supported responsive List/card template when available; retain CaseId because native list-click Read/drill-in requires it.

rollbackNotes: Use solution-manifest.json for bounded reverse-order cleanup.
Do not drop SNC.SupplierNonconformance without explicit authorization.
Retain the SNC short-code reservation unless the solution is permanently retired.
